entry.title: CJI4/CJI4N how to display statistical WBS elements
entry.content:
CJI4/CJI4N: does not display individual plan items on the WBS elements which are statistical.

Note: customizing has been checked according to KBA 1889941 - CJI4 doesn't show any value in certain version.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Validation for BP reconciliation account
entry.content:
Hi All,

Any idea how to add the checking for reconciliation account of BP? (Vendor and customer)

I have multiple accounts, but I want to restrict the account for specific BP type. So I want to add a customized checking here. I try to use SAPMF02K and SAPMF02D, but it can't trigger the coding part when I change the account and save it. Not sure it suit for S4 1809 version or not. Please help.

entry.title: Project WBS element budget exceeded - Message no. BP603
entry.content:
Hi SAP Project System Experts,

I am reaching out to request your help and support in our SAP PS AVAC analysis.

We're encountering challenges in PS budget. Where, system is throwing budget exceeded error for many WBS elements, despite the budget not actually being exceeded. In some cases MRP and project execution have begun before budget release(CJ32). And CJ32 is now preventing us from releasing the WBS due to a budget exceedance error, despite the budget not actually being exceeded.

We are having BOM structure as follows. And here I have taken an example for Semi finished product BOM.

We are posting consumption through production orders for this W-Code BOM. After this consumption, once the W-code stock is available, we will proceed to post the outbound delivery.

Please find detailed steps below for Material consumptions and Sales outbound delivery:

  • We procure B-Code materials and formulated a W-Code BOM to utilize them effectively.
  • Upon confirming the production order for W-Code, the system proceeded to consume the B-Code materials and manufacture the W-Code product. During this stage, cost element 401009 was debited and cost element 401002 was credited, both associated with their respective WBS elements, resulting in a net zero balance in “cji3”.
  • Following material consumption, we initiated outbound delivery, where the system debited cost element 401003 against the relevant WBS element.

I have attached screenshots of the AVAC and accounting entries for your review. These images clearly show two debit postings of cost elements with associated WBS allocations, as well as one credit posting of a cost element also tied to a specific WBS.

Budget AVAC for reference WBS VT/ESP/300.01.03.03

Accounting entries for Production order confirmation.

Accounting entries for Outbound delivery

As checked in SAP report “S_ALR_87013558” & “CJI3”, the cost of WBS VT/ESP/300.01.03.03 is below the budget of INR 30,000.

Report: S_ALR_87013558

CJI3

Could you please assist us in reviewing the situation where we are unable to activate AVAC due to exceeding our budget?

We are encountering a similar challenge in our multi-level BOM, where the system accumulates costs across each BOM level without accounting for credits to AVAC, resulting in budget exceeded errors.

As shown in below example, the total cost of the finished product is INR 1000. However, when consuming the first SFG, AVAC calculates the cost as INR 700 & 300, and when consuming the FG, the system calculates an additional INR 1000, resulting in a budget exceeded error.

I've already escalated this to SAP, and they advised implementing the specified S_Notes. Subsequently, we executed CJBW, CJBN, and CJEN as instructed by SAP. However, the issue persists despite these actions.

S_Notes:
1594484
1038917
3028730
2795283

We kindly request your guidance to ensure if we are correctly following the procedures for the PS module and not missing any activity here?

Thank you,
Yash (FI)

entry.title: Linking Dimensions across different models to pick the current master data status
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Planning, we have a requirement to fetch the store status based on the date filtered in the story.

In the below example, Store A is under renovation for Period 1 of 2024 to Period 3 of 2024
Store B is closed in Period 4
Store C was Already Open
Store D is a new store opened in Period 2 of 2024.

User will maintain the data in a custom table

 


Hence, the requirement is that lets assume we are in period 9 of the 2024.

If a person runs the period filter in the dashboard from Period 1 to Period 4, the below store status should be visible in the table, based on the data mentioned in the table

StoreStatus
ARenovation
BClosed
COpen
DNew

In the transaction data being sent to SAC, we have the store code & the posting date being sent.

We do not want to load this store status on the transactional data, since business might change the store status for backdated dates.

E.g., in July 2024, they might change the status of a store of Jan 2024.

Hence, based on the data in the table, we want the system to use a similar formula like VLOOKUP, where system would pick the status mentioned in the above table based on the store code & the period combination.

@N1kh1l if you could please provide any inputs in achieving this.

 

Regards,

Gavin.

entry.title: If we post a transaction if there are two ledgers. How many accounting entries are posted in s4 hana
entry.content: If we post a accounting entry how many entries are posted if we have two ledgers leading and non leading ledger.

entry.title: One chart of depreciation
entry.content: Can we assign one chart of depriciation to multiple company codes with different countries

entry.title: Postings for account type M ( posting key 99 ) during the entering invoice.
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I quite new in FI.

I have the problem that during simulation of incoming invoice I have some value posted with posting key 99 to material account.

Question what is the reason to post to this account? Can I somehow found from where is this difference is coming?

GR for value 21 954,24 EUR

Invoice simulation: Posted to account 307110 - 22024,03 EUR, and difference to material account.

Thank you,

entry.title: Bank balances are not triggering into CFA
entry.content:
Hi 

After receiving statements from the bank, the balances are not triggering into CFA, could anyone help me on this.

Thanks,

Sai charan

entry.title: How to use RFOPENPOSTING_FR for FEC report if for the France we use FAGL_IT_02 program?
entry.content:
Hi,

One question, for FEC France report it's necessary to run a carryforward report  RFOPENPOSTING_FR.

But for France we already use the FI closing report FAGL_IT_02 which provides access to FAGL_YEC_POSTINGS_EHP4 Italy / Closing/Opening Postings at Year End. 

Will there be any conflicts?

thank you

entry.title: ich möchte das Geschäftsjahr ändern. Aktuell Kalenderjahr und ab 01.10.2024.
entry.content: Ich habe das Geschäftsjahr gleich Kalenderjahr. Müll auch im Jahr 2024. Ab dem 01.10 soll ich ein neues Geschäftsjahr vom 01.10. bis zum 30.09 einrichten mit einem Rumpfgeschäftsjahr von 01.01.-30.09.24. Geht das überhaupt. Ich habe mal versucht, das im Customizing einzustellen, mit Rumpf für 2024 und 9 Perioden. Kann ich nicht speichern. Kommt immer ein Fehler. Kann mir jemand einen Tipp geben

entry.title: Error glt2201 when posting between customer/vendor
entry.content: I am trying to clear a customer and offsetting the difference to a Supplier account, the system is throwing the error Error glt2201 when posting between customer/vendor

entry.title: How to rename custom analytical application created via View-Browser
entry.content:
Hello how can an analytical application, which was created via custom analytical query and the App View-Browser, be renamed? It doesn't show the given description but the technical name of the query. How can the highlighted name be changed?
Thanks and best regards

entry.title: Payment rounding in F110
entry.content:
Hello, 

As per the ask from bank, we need to send the payment amount in rounded value or else it will be rejected in bank. 

For example: Amount 200.03 should be rounded to 200.00 or 200.05, it should be in the multiples of 0.05. I have maintained OB90 with value 5, even though payment amount is not getting rounded while running F110. 

Can you please let me know the option, that how can we achieve it in F110. 

Thanks, 

Mouli

entry.title: Change Posting Date (AFAB) - FAA_DEPRECIATION_POST
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues

Please your support with this issue:

When we run the depreciation Posting Run (AFAB), the AF document is created with date at the end of the month, even in months where the last day is a non-working day.

We need to adjust this behavior to ensure that the document's posting date is the last working day of the month.

For example, in June 2024, the depreciation document had a posting date of 30.06.2024 in the system.

But the correct posting date for us, is 28.06.2024 (the last working day of June).

Is there a way to make this adjustment?

Thanks for your support.

Regards

Karen

entry.title: Change currency in SAP S/4HANA report S_ALR_87013019
entry.content:
In SAP S 4HANA report S_ALR_87013019 how to change the currency for object value?
Currently it is only bringing ACC currency

entry.title: Error 00309 SM35
entry.content:
Hello.
During the processing of a file via SM35 there was a system failure leaving the status of in processing, it is necessary to complete the processing completely as only part of the items were registered. When trying to reprocess, message 00309 is returned. 
Best Regards 
Nadir

entry.title: GL Balance has negative balance and balance should be zero.
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

GL Balance 2642411 has negative balances of 30.27 and the user wants the balance to be made NIL or Zero.

Without posting an entry , is there any way, to change the GL Balance as NIL or Zero. We are in ECC 6.0

Please suggest.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: No measurement unit is assigned to ISO code SPACE while interface to SAP
entry.content:
Dears,

We are facing the error message -No measurement unit is assigned to ISO code SPACE

Issue occurs with Purchase order Unit price and PO price unit difference scenarios.

Interface system is not able to send response to SAP for further Parking Invoice and IR invoice. 

Appreciate if anyone can share the feedback on the issue faced earlier.

Best Regards,

Awneesh

entry.title: S4 1909 on premises -Down payment request via workflow process
entry.content:
Dears,

In S/4HANA 1909 on-premises, is there a way to create a similar workflow approval for handling down payment requests?

We want to improve efficiency, traceability, and compliance by automating this process.

 

Could you please guide us on how to:

  1. Create a similar transaction in our on-premise system?
  2. Set up an approval workflow for down payment requests?

 

Best Regards,

Awneesh

entry.title: Hardware Key Error
entry.content: I have a error in SUM, SAP don't take the Hardware Key
